configurations.name: unittest
configurations.comment: unitUnthreaded: the deterministic sim is GC-heavy; running it single-threaded avoids a parallel GC-allocation-pressure crash in the test runner (not a raft or production issue). Override with -- --threads=N.

description: Raft consensus for D on vibe-core — zero-GC data plane, storage-agnostic. Built for dreads.
